nasb.text: For the Son of Man is going to come in the glory of His Father with His angels, and will then repay every man according to his deeds.

esv.text: For the Son of Man is going to come with his angels in the glory of his Father, and then he will repay each person according to what he has done.

cnv.text: 人子要在父的榮耀裡和眾天使一同降臨，那時他要照各人的行為報應各人。

ccb.text: “因为人子要在祂父的荣耀中与众天使一起降临，那时，祂将按照各人的行为报应各人。

csbs.text: 人子将要在他父的荣耀中，与他的天使们一起来临。那时候，他要按照各人的所作所为回报每个人。
